text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I head to the gym to think of a new training
regime, when...

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Grrr... I'm not done yeeeeet!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I see Twin Turbo shaking violently as she tries to
lift up an extremely heavy barbell.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Ab...solutely!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: I'm training to get super-duper swole!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I wanna get strong enough that I can make
everyone eat my dust!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
In my last race, the other runners beat me out of
the gate.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
It's not faaair! I wanna be in the lead from start to
finish!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: If I wanna be first, I've gotta get stronger!
choice_data_list: I think you should prioritize speed, actually.
Yeah, strength is the way to go!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Whaaaaat?! It's not strength I should focus on?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain that the trick is to overwhelm her
opponents with crushing speed at the start, then
maintain her pace for the rest of the race.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: I should overwhelm them with speed at the start...

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe. So as long as I keep running, I'll always
be number one!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I'll hit up the treadmill and work on my
short-burst sprinting!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Hraaaaah! Turbo BOOOOOST!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Twin Turbo hastily clambers onto a treadmill, sets
it to max speed, and begins running like a demon.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I knew I was right! ♪

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
With the soup cream power I have gained, I am
now all-powerful!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Here I go! I'll show everyone just what it means to have strength!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Hraaaaah! Power BOOOOOST!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Twin Turbo heads toward an even heavier barbell
and begins trying to lift it.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Nnngh! My arms... They BUUURN!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: But I can keep going... I can keep... GOIIING!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I expected, I have to stop Twin Turbo before
she overdoes it and injures her arms.
